title: Wood waxing
description: Adds ability to wax wood, so fire can't destroy it
body:
**Wood waxing — Protect Your Builds!**

Wood waxing introduces a new mechanic to Minecraft that allows you to wax your planks and logs!

This mod adds a brand new Creative Tab and a special Waxing Item to make your building experience more professional and organized.

**What's inside?**

- Waxing Tool: A new item specifically designed to treat your wood.

- Waxed Logs: Beautiful, polished versions of your favorite building blocks.

- Creative Tab: No more searching through the "Building Blocks" tab — all waxed variants are in one dedicated place!

- New Recipes: Now you can craft wood directly from logs more efficiently.

**Why you should use it:**

Perfect for Builders: Great for detailing floors, furniture, and museum-style builds.

Organized Gameplay: The custom creative tab keeps your inventory clean.

Vanilla+ Style: Feels like a feature Mojang forgot to add!

Optimized: Works smoothly on both single-player and servers.

**Connect with us:**

- Support us on Ko-fi: https://ko-fi.com/netheritegroup

- Modrinth Profile: https://modrinth.com/user/NetheriteGroup

- CurseForge Projects: https://www.curseforge.com/members/netheritegroup/projects
